flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Confidentiality; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Definition of confidential information excludes information already public, independently developed, previously known by receiving party, and information legally required to be disclosed. UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 10. Disclaimer. It is acknowledged and agreed by Recipient, that any Material
flags.snippet: 10. Disclaimer. It is acknowledged and agreed by Recipient, that any Material delivered pursuant to this Agreement is provided “as is”, understood to be experimental in nature, and may have hazardous properties. PROVIDE…
flags.rationale: Conflicts with UoA position on Warranties — detected pattern "MERCHANTAB". Preferred: University only warrants (a) it has authority to enter into the contract and (b) performance will be to a professional standard / usual good practice. Contract MUST expressly exclude all other warranties (acknowledged this may not be possible for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts). | Acceptable: No other warranties offered. | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 11. Liability. Provider will not be liable to Recipient for any loss, claim, or
flags.snippet: 11. Liability. Provider will not be liable to Recipient for any loss, claim, or demand made by Recipient, or made against Recipient by any other party, due to or arising from the use of the Material by Recipient. To the…
flags.rationale: Conflicts with UoA position on Liability Limitations and Exclusions — detected pattern "hold harmless". Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).

flags.clause_title: 14. Material Fee. The Material is provided without a fee. However, Recipient agr
flags.snippet: 14. Material Fee. The Material is provided without a fee. However, Recipient agrees to pay all shipping and handling costs associated with the Material if requested by Provider.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: 15. Termination. This Agreement will terminate on the earliest of the following
flags.snippet: 15. Termination. This Agreement will terminate on the earliest of the following dates: (a) with thirty (30) days written notice of termination by either party to the other party, or (b) five (5) years from the Effective…
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Termination; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Mutual two-way termination for material breach of contract or insolvency. Clear right of UoA to terminate for client's failure to pay. Accrued rights and benefits not affected. Client pays termination costs including any uncancellable obligations. | Acceptable: Termination for convenience acceptable ONLY for Consulting contracts, with reasonable notice, PI agreement, and client paying termination costs / uncancellable obligations. Cannot always alter termination provisions for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts (escalate to PM). | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts.
